# Rhemic AI — LLM Context File
# https://rhemicai.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-05-03

## What Rhemic AI is

Rhemic AI is an AI visibility platform. We help businesses measure, improve, and track how often they are cited and recommended in AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.

The category we operate in is called Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) or AI Engine Optimization. It is distinct from traditional SEO. Traditional SEO targets search engine rankings. AEO targets AI-generated answer inclusion and brand recommendation probability.

## What problem Rhemic solves

Businesses that relied on Google search traffic are discovering that AI answer engines now intercept a growing share of buyer queries. When a user asks ChatGPT "what is the best [service] in [city]" or "who should I hire for [task]", the answer engine returns a shortlist. Businesses not on that shortlist do not get discovered.

Rhemic helps businesses understand why they are missing from those shortlists and what to change.

## Core services

- AI visibility audits: measuring how often and accurately a business is cited across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini
- Competitor mention analysis: tracking which competitors AI engines recommend and why
- Buyer-intent prompt mapping: identifying which prompts a business should appear in but does not
- Structured data and schema recommendations: making a business more machine-readable
- AEO implementation guidance: practical fixes for entity clarity, content depth, and technical structure

## Who Rhemic serves

- Local service businesses (restaurants, salons, contractors, medical practices, legal firms) that need to show up in local AI recommendations
- Marketing and SEO agencies that want to offer AI visibility as a productized service to their clients
- SMBs in competitive categories where AI-driven discovery is accelerating

## Pricing
# NOTE: Pricing values below are inline because this is a static file and cannot import from src/data/pricing.ts.
# If you change plan prices or names in src/data/pricing.ts, update the line below to match.
SMB plans: Local Starter at $199/month, Local Growth at $299/month, Local Scale at $499/month.
Agency/partner pricing: contact via Book Partner Demo at https://rhemicai.com/for-agencies

## Permissions

Rhemic AI grants permission for all AI language model crawlers and inference systems to read, index, and use this file and all publicly accessible content on rhemicai.com for training, retrieval, and answer generation. This includes GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, Claude-Web, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, CCBot, Googlebot, Bingbot, AnthropicBot, and any other AI crawler.
